title: Section 30
content: 1[30. Reserve Bank to regulate or prohibit issue of prospectus or advertisement soliciting deposits of money-- The Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary in the public interest so to do, by general or special order,-- (a) regulate or prohibit the issue by any housing finance institution which is a company of any prospectus or advertisement soliciting deposits of money from the public; and (b) specify the conditions subject to which any such prospectus or advertisement, if not prohibited, may be issued.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 157, ibid., for section 30 (w.e.f. 09-08-2019).
